name: git
description: Run git commands against the agent's workspace on the gateway host. Supports clone, pull, push, commit, and more. Authentication uses a per-agent ed25519 SSH key stored at ~/.beige/agents/<name>/ssh/id_ed25519 — never the gateway operator's own SSH keys. Repository deletion and git config mutation are permanently blocked. Force-push is blocked by default.
commands: clone <url> [dir]                         — Clone a repository into the workspace

allowedCommands.description: Whitelist of git subcommands the agent may run. Defaults to a safe read/write set when absent. 'config' is always blocked regardless of this setting.

deniedCommands.description: Blacklist of git subcommands. Always blocked even if present in allowedCommands. Deny beats allow.

allowedRemotes.description: Glob patterns matched against remote URLs. If set, push/fetch/pull/clone are only permitted to matching remotes. Omit to allow all remotes.

allowForcePush.description: Allow git push --force and --force-with-lease. Default: false.

identity.description: Git commit author identity. If omitted, falls back to whatever git finds in the workspace .git/config. Values can use ${ENV_VAR} for injection.

auth.description: Authentication override. When absent, the tool uses the per-agent SSH key at agentDir/ssh/id_ed25519 (recommended). Use this only when you need a non-default key path or HTTPS token auth.

mode.description: 'agent-ssh' (default) — uses agentDir/ssh/id_ed25519. 'ssh' — uses a literal sshKeyPath. 'https' — uses a PAT from config.token.

sshKeyPath.description: Absolute path to SSH private key. Only used when mode is 'ssh'.

sshKnownHostsPath.description: Absolute path to known_hosts file. Only used when mode is 'ssh'. Defaults to agentDir/ssh/known_hosts.

token.description: HTTPS PAT (Personal Access Token). Only used when mode is 'https'. Can use ${ENV_VAR} for injection.

user.description: HTTPS username. Only used when mode is 'https'. Defaults to 'x-access-token'. Can use ${ENV_VAR}.
